articles.title: Watch: Agnikul fires world's largest single-piece 3D-printed rocket engine
articles.description: Watch Agnikul fires worlds largest singlepiece Dprinted rocket engine

articles.title: Trump’s use of Pakistan as possible mediator with Iran sparks memories of Nixon’s China talks and Bangladesh liberation
articles.description: March 25 marks 55 years since Pakistan Army launched Operation Searchlight

articles.title: When the Chief Justice steps away
articles.description: The recusal of CJI Surya Kant from the Chief Election Commissioner appointment law challenge case raises important questions about conflict of interest, the doctrine of necessity, and the limits of pre-emptive judicial direction, as well as the need for a statute governing judicial recusal

articles.title: Mint Explainer: Why is India betting big on Trout, Mahseer and cold-water fisheries?
articles.description: India is ramping up cold-water fisheries to tap high-value species like Trout and Mahseer, boost hill livelihoods, and unlock a niche aquaculture segment with export potential.

articles.title: Petrol pumps in Hyderabad, Indore see long queues of motorists amid energy crisis; Internet reacts: ‘Lines upto 500m’
articles.description: Panic buying of fuel is increasing in India amid ongoing Middle East conflict despite government assurances of no petrol, diesel, and LPG shortages. Long queues at petrol pumps were reported across various cities

articles.title: No fuel shortage in Telangana: Petroleum Dealers Association
articles.description: Rumour-driven panic buying triggers three-fold surge in fuel sales, says the association on March 25, 2026

topStories.description: Some are left without an income, others are temporarily displaced, and no one knows when the internet will return .

topStories.description: The Committee also called for widespread community consultation before any further amendments are brought to the 2019 law

topStories.title: US Family Rejects $26 Million Offer To Sell Farmland For AI Data Centre

topStories.title: US Stock Market | William Lee warns quick resolution unlikely amid ongoing talks
topStories.description: Global markets are cautiously optimistic as Middle East conflict talks progress, though regional divisions persist. Investors are watching actions over rhetoric, with Asia facing significant economic fallout if disruptions occur. Central banks may prioritize growth over inflation if the conflict escalates, making a swift resolution crucial for stability.

topStories.title: Himanta's allegations linking me to Pakistan wild theory existing in his head: Gaurav Gogoi
topStories.description: What we are saying about his family, his wealth, corruption, and the benefit that the government machinery is giving to his wife’s company — that is for everybody to see, claimed Assam Congress President Gaurav Gogoi

topStories.title: From Strait of Hormuz to Iran's nuclear programme and US sanctions — What we know of Trump's 15-point ceasefire plan
topStories.description: News of the 15-point plan sent by the Trump administration comes a couple of days after the US President promised to hold off on strikes against Iran's energy infrastructure, citing ‘very good and productive’ talks with Tehran.

topStories.title: 'U-turn Ustad': Congress slams PM bid for 'special session' to pass women quota law amendments
topStories.description: Congress general secretary in charge of communications, Jairam Ramesh, said the Modi government is also planning to increase the size of the Lok Sabha and the Vidhan Sabhas by 50%, which also needs careful deliberation.

topStories.description: The teams are set to play on June 15 in Los Angeles, but Iran has threatened to boycott its matches due to the war.

dailyNews.title: US to send thousands of soldiers from 82nd Airborne Division to Middle East
dailyNews.description: The US is expected to deploy up to 3,000 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division to the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Sagility shares rocket 8% after Nomura initiates coverage with buy rating, sees it as top AI beneficiary
dailyNews.description: Sagility share price surged 8% after Nomura initiated coverage with a Buy rating and a Rs 55 target price. The brokerage sees Sagility benefiting from AI in healthcare. The company serves US health insurance firms and hospitals. Institutional investors have increased their stakes. Sagility's stock has seen a decline recently.

dailyNews.description: Tehran's statement on opening of key waterway comes as US President Trump says talks are taking place to end the war.

dailyNews.title: BJP chief’s affidavit: Cong, CPI(M) plan legal action
dailyNews.description: Congress and CPI(M) plan legal action against BJP's Rajeev Chandrasekhar for allegedly concealing property in his election affidavit.

dailyNews.title: Gujarat Govt passes UCC Bill; live-in registration made mandatory; Congress calls it ‘anti-Muslim’ legislation
dailyNews.description: The ruling Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) hailed the bill, which exempts tribals, as a landmark reform to ensure equality. The Opposition Congress vehemently opposed it, saying it violates fundamental rights and was ‘anti-Muslim’.

dailyNews.description: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.

dailyNews.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale kitchen deals: Up to 59% off Ninja, Cuisinart and more

dailyNews.description: Donald Trump recalls being dazzled by Queen Elizabeth II's diplomatic tact in "The Queen and Her Presidents," saying her refusal to criticize anyone was "genius."

dailyNews.title: Dems vow to force weekly Iran war votes after GOP blocks latest move to curb Trump
dailyNews.description: Senate Republicans blocked another war powers resolution, this time from Sen. Chris Murphy, D-Conn., as Democrats vow to force at least one vote per week.

dailyNews.title: 2,000 U.S. Troops From 82nd Airborne Division to Be Sent to Middle East
dailyNews.description: The order gives President Trump more military options as he considers diplomacy with Iran. It is unclear where the soldiers will go in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Democrat Emily Gregory Wins Florida Special Election in Mar-a-Lago’s District
dailyNews.description: Emily Gregory’s victory in Palm Beach brought the Democratic surge to President Trump’s backyard, while a union leader leads in a race for a state senate seat vacated by Florida’s lieutenant governor.

dailyNews.title: N.C. Senator Phil Berger Officially Just Lost to Sam Page
dailyNews.description: Phil Berger had money, power and an endorsement from President Trump. But his critics had a long list of resentments and, on Tuesday, he lost by a mere 23 votes.

dailyNews.title: Trump and Republican National Committee Lean Toward Dallas for Unusual 2026 GOP Midterm Convention
dailyNews.description: Parties normally hold conventions every four years to nominate presidential candidates, but Republicans hope to hold one this year in the face of midterm headwinds.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Step Up Efforts to Reach DHS Funding Deal and End Shutdown
dailyNews.description: A day after President Trump said he did not want a compromise, Senate Republicans sent Democrats a plan that would break off ICE enforcement funding and reopen the rest of the department.

dailyNews.title: Trump Picks ‘Alpha Male’ Influencer to Be Tourism Envoy
dailyNews.description: Nick Adams, known for his crass humor and internet trolling, was previously nominated to be the ambassador to Malaysia. But his nomination was pulled earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Seems Open to Trump Request to Block Asylum Seekers at Border
dailyNews.description: A policy of turning back many asylum seekers at the border was rescinded in 2021, but the Justice Department wants the flexibility to reinstate it as a tool for border control.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on with Pentagon expected to send more troops to Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Trump said several members of his administration were involved in talks with Iran about the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: We asked every lawmaker in Congress what they're doing to end the DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers and President Trump appear to be edging closer to a framework to wrap up the Department of Homeland Security shutdown — but a breakthrough has remained out of reach. CBS News contacted every House and Senate office to ask what they're doing to end the shutdown.

dailyNews.title: 3/24: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump says Vance and Rubio are involved in talks with Iran; Senate inches toward a potential DHS funding solution.

dailyNews.title: Democrat flips Florida state legislative district that includes Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: Democrat Emily Gregory won a special election for a Florida state House seat on Tuesday, flipping a district that is home to President Trump's estate, Mar-a-Lago.
